message:
fix: exclude reparented children from molecule auto-close (GH#2480)

Hierarchical children (parentID.N pattern) that have been reparented to
a different parent are now skipped during molecule subgraph loading.
Prevents stale dotted-ID matches from blocking auto-close of completed
molecules.

Fixes #2476

Co-Authored-By: MelsovCOZY <MelsovCOZY@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
